zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan NEVILLE於1257年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德林加姆時，她的父親Alexander de Néville48歲，母親Julliana de Monmouth48歲。她於大約1275年與Thomas de Heaton在英國諾圖波藍德林加姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1318年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾雷德布恩享年61歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan NEVILLE于1257年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德林加姆时，她的父亲Alexander de Néville48岁，母亲Julliana de Monmouth48岁。她于大约1275年与Thomas de Heaton在英国諾圖波藍德林加姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1318年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾雷德布恩享年61岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德。

nameMeanings.name: NEVILLE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan NEVILLE was born in 1257, in Chillingham, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Alexander de Néville, was 48 and her mother, Julliana de Monmouth, was 48. She married Thomas de Heaton about 1275, in Chillingham, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1318, in Redbourne, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan NEVILLE est née en 1257, à Chillingham, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alexander de Néville, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Julliana de Monmouth, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Heaton environ 1275, à Chillingham, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1318, à Redbourne, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan NEVILLE 1257 in Chillingham, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander de Néville 48 und ihre Mutter Julliana de Monmouth 48. Sie hat um 1275 in Chillingham, Northumberland, England Thomas de Heaton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1318 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Redbourne, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan NEVILLE è nata il nel 1257 nel Chillingham, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Alexander de Néville, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Julliana de Monmouth, aveva 48 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Heaton circa 1275, nel Chillingham, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1318, nel Redbourne, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan NEVILLEが1257年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドチリンガムで生まれた時，父Alexander de Névilleは48歳，母Julliana de Monmouthは48歳であった。約1275年にイギリスノースウンバーランドチリンガムでThomas de Heatonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1318年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアレドボウルンで61歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan NEVILLE(이)가 1257년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 치링함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander de Néville(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Julliana de Monmouth(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 대략 1275년 영국 노르스벌랜드 치링함에서 Thomas de Heaton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1318년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 레드보우른에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan NEVILLE nasceu em 1257, em Chillingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alexander de Néville, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Julliana de Monmouth, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Heaton aproximadamente 1275, em Chillingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1318, em Redbourne, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan NEVILLE родилась в 1257 г. в местности чиллингхам, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Alexander de Néville было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Julliana de Monmouth, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Heaton около 1275 г. в местности чиллингхам, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1318 г. в местности редбурн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan NEVILLE nació en 1257, en Chillingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Alexander de Néville, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Julliana de Monmouth, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Thomas de Heaton aproximadamente 1275, en Chillingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1318, en Redbourne, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Northumberland, Inglaterra.
